pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-009 (Security and Privacy/Knowledge) scores 0.438 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.438) and is edge_case for the Robotics Engineer role. Core role signal: 0 pattern match(es). Seniority is appropriate for this role.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with edge_case scope, EU AI Act signal (0.438), and Security and Privacy handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Security in robotics systems (secure comms, access control for robots) in 20-35% of Robotics Eng postings. Org-level security policy is not a Robotics Engineer requirement.
